stengression: Spatiotemporal Engression
=======================================

Welcome to the documentation for **stengression**.

.. grid:: 2

    .. grid-item-card:: ⬇️ Install
       :link: install
       :link-type: doc

       Get started by installing the `stengression` package.

    .. grid-item-card:: 📖 User Guide

       :link-type: doc

       Explore our example notebook for forecasting workflows.

       :link: api
       :link-type: doc

       Detailed references for Models, Losses, and Utils.

       :link: cite
       :link-type: doc

       Information on citing this work in your research.
